title: aegilops speltoides var. ligustica
intro: Aegilops speltoides var. ligustica, also known as ligustic goatgrass, is a plant species belonging to the wheat grass family, characterized by its distinctive grass-like appearance and small, spike-shaped inflorescences. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Aegilops speltoides var. ligustica include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
